series.title: Agentic AI
series.description: A hands-on series on building AI agents — from first principles and a beginner tutorial, through design reflections, to multi-agent orchestration and integrating agents into existing software.

articles.title: AI Agents 101: What They Are and Why They Matter
Building Your First AI Agent: A Gym Trainer Tutorial
Building Agentic Software: Reflections and Design Principles
Building a Complete Health Tracker: Multi-Agent System in Action
Integrating AI Agents into Existing Software: Three Approaches

series_archived.title: Building Trustworthy AI Systems
series_archived.description: A series exploring how we design AI that is not just powerful, but safe, interpretable, and aligned with human values — from uncertainty quantification to real-world deployment.

articles.title: Why uncertainty matters in production AI
The trust paradox in autonomous systems

series_archived.title: From Research to Startup
series_archived.description: Lessons from taking AI research out of the lab and into the real world — the messy, exhilarating, and often humbling journey of building a company around a technical idea.

articles.title: What MIT didn't teach me about startups
Raising a seed round as a technical founder

series_archived.title: AI Meets the Clinic
series_archived.description: How AI is reshaping healthcare operations, from the front desk to diagnosis — and why getting it right requires as much empathy as engineering.

articles.title: The AI receptionist: a new kind of first impression
